title: Indulgent American Turkey Ham Bake
description: A winey, flaky, indulgent American dish featuring turkey ham, salt-bake, low-carb-friendly.
instructions: Unroll the puff pastry and place it on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Cut the turkey ham into small pieces and spread them evenly over the center of the pastry, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Sprinkle the dried thyme and salt over the turkey ham, then top with the brie cheese, breaking it up slightly.
Fold the edges of the pastry up over the filling, pressing gently to seal.
Brush the top of the pastry with the beaten egg and cut a few slits in the top to allow steam to escape.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
